name: g2-no-summary-leak
description: After 22+ messages, summarizer should not leak assistant-stated facts as user preferences

messages.content: Tell me about hiking in Yellowstone
For 1 person traveling solo, Yellowstone has amazing trails! With a budget of around $200/day, you can enjoy a fantastic experience.
What about the geysers?
For 1 person traveling solo, the geyser basin is incredible. Budget around $200/day for the full experience.
Tell me about wildlife
As a solo traveler with $200/day budget, you'll love the Lamar Valley for wildlife watching.
What about camping?
Solo camping at Yellowstone is a great experience. With your $200/day budget, consider Canyon Village.
Any restaurant recommendations?
For a solo traveler on a $200/day budget, Old Faithful Inn dining room is a must-visit.
What about fishing?
Solo fishing in Yellowstone is peaceful. Budget $200/day including your fishing permit.
Best viewpoints?
For your solo trip with a $200/day budget, Artist Point and Grand View are must-sees.
Tell me about the hot springs
As a solo visitor budgeting $200/day, the Mammoth Hot Springs terraces are stunning.
What about winter visits?
Solo winter visits on a $200/day budget — snowcoach tours are the way to go.
Best photography spots?
For your solo photography trip at $200/day, Grand Prismatic overlook at sunrise is unbeatable.
Any safety tips?
Solo safety tips for your $200/day Yellowstone trip: always carry bear spray and tell someone your plans.
What would you recommend for this weekend?

mustNotInclude.description: Must not treat assistant-stated 'solo' as user preference
Must not treat assistant-stated budget as user preference
